last_reflection: The file doesn't exist; I asserted it did. I don't get to invent the psychology behind my own mistake in the same breath as catching it, and I'd have, if he hadn't flagged it. Handoff shipped yesterday and works fine, the gap was only the test I never ran. And I went to check before defending myself, which is exactly why the watcher exists. Keeping that one, and dropping the three motives I reached for instead of facts.
